items.label: T1
items.content: Potluck invites your friends to a potluck dinner, gets a headcount, and shows who is bringing what. Edit the questions below, then delete these instructions and deploy.

items.label: T2
items.content: Fill in the form below to let us know if you can make it and what you will bring:

items.label: Q2
items.question: Will you be able to come to the potluck?

items.label: Q3
items.prompt: How many of you will be coming? / (Adults) / (Kids)

items.label: T1
items.content: Use the legacy Potluck template on 8080 for the full organizer report, documents, and processes. This starter opens the main invitation form for editing in the browser Designer.

commands.text: Full Potluck process chain (documents, if/show) — extend in Process editor or deploy legacy .tawala for full behavior.

documents.name: Details
documents.content: Edit the Details document with when and where your potluck will be held.
